best_bet.reason: The warmest water and calmest conditions of the three counties combine with that morning low tide window to make Pender the ideal spot for families and shellers who want glassy, protected waters and exposed sand.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
